wordplay_note: Fay's husband who is driven to attempted murder
card_description: Charley Hume is a character in Philip K. Dick's *Confessions of a Crap Artist*. Fay's long-suffering husband who she drives to the breaking point. Name note: Fay's husband who is driven to attempted murder. The ordinary man destroyed by a force of nature in human form. First appears in *Confessions of a Crap Artist*.

reference.brief: Fay's long-suffering husband who she drives to the breaking point
reference.significance: The ordinary man destroyed by a force of nature in human form
